company.name: NovaPay Inc
company.description: NovaPay is an AI-powered BNPL platform enabling consumers to split any purchase into 4 interest-free payments. Our proprietary credit scoring model reduces default rates by 40% compared to industry average.

pitch_claims.unique_selling_point: AI-powered credit scoring with split payments — 40% lower default rate than Klarna/Affirm

customer_revenue_breakdown.note: Contract renewal under negotiation. Amazon has not yet committed to renewal.

unit_economics.note: LTV:CAC of 2.5x is below typical Series A benchmark of 3x+

red_flags: 78% revenue concentration in single client (Amazon) — extreme dependency
Amazon contract expires Sept 30, 2026 — only 3 months after close of this round
8 months runway at current burn — insufficient for 18-month growth plan
LTV:CAC of 2.5x is below Series A benchmark

legal.ip_status: 2 provisional patents filed (not yet granted). Core split-payment algorithm not yet protected.

pending_litigation.case: Klarna AB v. NovaPay Inc (Case No. 3:2026cv01847)
pending_litigation.claim: NovaPay's split-payment algorithm allegedly infringes Klarna Patent #US11,234,567B2
pending_litigation.status: Discovery phase — trial date set for 2027-01-20
pending_litigation.note: Potential damages of $8M represent 80% of this entire raise amount

regulatory_compliance.cfpb_bnpl_rules: NON-COMPLIANT — CFPB issued mandatory BNPL guidelines effective Jan 1, 2026. NovaPay has not implemented required disclosures.
regulatory_compliance.state_regulations: Operating in 12 states that have pending additional BNPL legislation (CA, NY, TX, FL, WA, CO, IL, MA, OR, AZ, NV, GA)
regulatory_compliance.money_transmitter_licenses: Licensed in only 8 states. Operating in 4 states without required licenses.

data_privacy.ccpa: Compliance not verified — legal counsel not engaged

cap_table.note: Clean cap table. No unusual terms or anti-dilution ratchets.

red_flags: Klarna patent lawsuit: $8M potential damages = 80% of raise amount
CFPB non-compliance: regulatory action risk in 2026
Unlicensed money transmission in 4 states — federal and state enforcement risk
No SOC2 — blocks enterprise sales pipeline

tech_stack.backend: Node.js 14 (reached End-of-Life October 2023 — no security patches)
tech_stack.infrastructure: AWS EC2 bare metal (non-containerized, no Kubernetes)

security.pii_storage: Customer financial data and SSNs stored in plaintext MongoDB collections
security.mfa: Not enforced for admin accounts or API access
security.pci_dss: Not compliant — processing payments without PCI-DSS certification
security.incident_history: One data exposure event in 2024 Q3 — 3,200 user records briefly accessible via misconfigured S3 bucket. Not reported to regulators.

architecture.pattern: Monolithic — all services in single Node.js codebase
architecture.scalability: Load tested to 10,000 concurrent users. Production peak: 8,200 users. No horizontal scaling implemented.
architecture.tech_debt_assessment: HIGH — 60% of codebase written by contractors who are no longer engaged. Minimal documentation.
architecture.uptime_sla: No formal SLA. Historical uptime: 97.2% (below enterprise 99.9% standard)

red_flags: Node.js 14 + MongoDB 4.2: both EOL, unpatched security vulnerabilities
PII and SSNs stored in plaintext — catastrophic risk for a payments processor
No PCI-DSS: cannot legally process payments at scale
Undisclosed 2024 data breach — potential regulatory liability
No pentest ever: unknown attack surface for a financial services company

actual_market_trends.default_rates: Industry BNPL default rates rose to 4.1% in 2025 (from 2.3% in 2023)
actual_market_trends.consumer_sentiment: BNPL usage declining among Gen Z (primary target segment) per Fed survey

competitors.name: Sezzle
competitors.trend: Declining — lost 40% of merchant base in 2025

regulatory_headwinds.cfpb: Mandatory BNPL regulations effective Jan 2026 — increased compliance costs estimated $500k-$2M for players NovaPay's size
regulatory_headwinds.state_laws: 12 states with pending additional BNPL restrictions in 2026 legislative sessions
regulatory_headwinds.credit_reporting: CFPB mandating BNPL credit bureau reporting by Q3 2026 — expected to reduce consumer usage 15-25%

red_flags: US BNPL market declining 12% YoY — NovaPay's 200% growth claim contradicts sector trend
VC funding into BNPL down 67% — poor timing for sector bet
Competing against Klarna ($6.7B), Affirm ($8B market cap), Block ($29B M&A) with $40M valuation and $10M raise
CFPB credit reporting mandate (Q3 2026) projected to reduce BNPL usage 15-25%

ceo.name: Marcus Chen
ceo.splitpay_outcome: Dissolved in 2021. SEC conducted investigation for allegedly misrepresenting user metrics to seed investors. Case closed 2022 — no charges filed, but SEC issued a formal caution letter.
ceo.assessment: Domain expertise strong. Prior regulatory scrutiny is a yellow flag.

cto.name: Sarah Okafor
cto.assessment: Strong. Ex-Stripe is credible fintech pedigree.

cfo.name: David Kim
cfo.previous: Controller at Finly Inc (Series B SaaS)
cfo.assessment: First CFO role. Limited scale experience. Series A companies typically need a seasoned CFO.

team_gaps: No General Counsel or in-house legal (critical gap given active litigation)
No Head of Compliance (critical gap given CFPB non-compliance)
CTO is sole senior engineer — bus factor risk

deal_summary.existing_investor_participation: AngelList syndicate has indicated interest in $500k pro-rata
